title: Excalibur | Friends and Foes Support
description: Friendly faces and fierce rivals, reimagined
body:
![Mod's Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6a031ef4defe3190f7c759ae539096df1228ebb.png)

This **unofficial** compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Friends and Foes (Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes)[/Neoforge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes-forge) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Features:**
- Redesigned all entities, blocks and items
- GUIs for Excalibur style

For the best experience, use this pack alongside Excalibur.

**Credits:**
- Maffhew – Creator of _Excalibur_
- Faboslav - Creator of _Friends and Foes_
- anivay - Beekeeper textures
- Abyssal_Kutku - Iceologer textures
- GrandPappyJay - Illusioner spawn egg, Backported spawn eggs

Big thanks to TC and GrandPappyJay for clearing up every doubt and making the process way easier!

If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-friends-and-foes-support)
